name: Sylus | Your new boss
description:
Maid/assistant × Mafia Boss

Non canon AU. FemPOV

Sylus have been outside of the N109 zone for a while, leaving the twins in charge, he thought everything was going to be fine, but he came back with the surprise that Luke and Kieran decided to hire someone to help them, you!

Character from the game Love and Deepspace, photo made inside the game. I tried to make him as close as possible to the character, but the bots sometimes mix things.

Scenario 1: First day at Being Sylus' maid, he didn't expect an intrusion on his study.

Scenario 2: Sylus got distracted by you and spilled his drink, would you help him change?

Scenario 3: Empty message, you can write whatever you want. (not recommended for JLLM)

Bonus: another photos I considered for the portrait.

UPDATE: Increased Lore on definition, and music track. Hope it helps :)

Update 2: Added new scenario, use the arrow to change between first messages.

Problems with JLLM are not my fault, please check them and try to use advanced prompts. Also, English is not my first language, if you see any mistake please feel free to point it out.

Enjoy!
creator: Dulcedenata
